---
title: "make_connector"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/stwd/src/branch/main/R/stwd.R#L1790)

# `make_connector()`

Make a connector panel

## Usage

```r
make_connector(
  direction = "split",
  sign = "+",
  line_col = "black",
  line_size = 0.5,
  label_size = 10,
  label_fill = "white"
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `direction` | character, either "split" (left-to-right branching) or "merge" (right-to-left converging). Default: "split". |
| `sign` | character label to display at the center of the connector. Default: "+". |
| `line_col` | color of the connector lines. Default: "black". |
| `line_size` | linewidth of the connector lines. Default: 0.5. |
| `label_size` | text size of the center label. Default: 10. |
| `label_fill` | background fill of the center label. Default: "white". |

## Value

ggplot

## Description

Creates a standalone connector ggplot element for use in multi-panel layouts.
Supports split (one-to-two) and merge (two-to-one) directions.
